creator: remko@elvandar.org
text:
>>Description:
> tar crashes when omitting '=' with -W exclude
>>How-To-Repeat:
> tar cvzf foo.tar.gz -W exclude foo
>>Fix:

Hello,

It would have been great if you could have just reported this on the
mailinglists first to discuss this and all before submitting a new PR
ticket. This doesn't contain enough information imo to make sure that we
can do something with this.

Tim; I copied you in since you are the maintainer of BSDtar as far as I
know; I have a bsdtar.core file available for you if you want to have that
give me a yell. I didn't have my system compiled in with DEBUG options etc
so I am not sure whether there is relevant data in it.

Best regards,
remko

-- 
Kind regards,

     Remko Lodder               ** remko@elvandar.org
     FreeBSD                    ** remko@FreeBSD.org

     /* Quis custodiet ipsos custodes */
